title: Vax Genuine ONEPWR 4.0Ah MAX Battery Replacement, 3 Year Warranty, Fits every ONEPWR product, BV29040V, Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: GENUINE VAX ONEPWR 4.0Ah MAX BATTERY – Works with every ONEPWR product from hard floor cleaners to vacuums, spot cleaners and more
3 YEAR GUARANTEE – Trusted VAX ONEPWR quality for extra peace of mind
FAST CHARGING – Fully charge your battery from empty in just 3 hours, or partly charge if you only need to do a quick clean
LED RUNTIME INDICATORS – With built in diagnostic LEDs, always know your remaining runtime
PREMIUM BATTERIES ENGINEERED FOR RELIABILITY – Constant battery performance, even when the battery is low
WHAT'S IN THE BOX - VAX ONEPWR 4.0Ah MAX Battery, contact our award winning after-sales support team on 0330 026 8455
description: The revolutionary VAX ONEPWR™ 4.0Ah Battery, our interchangeable battery technologyEvery ONEPWR™ Battery works with every ONEPWR™ product from hard floor cleaners to vacuums, spot cleaners andmore.Trusted VAX ONEPWR™ quality – backed with a 3 year guaranteeExpertly designed to work seamlessly with all VAX's cordless products. If you need more run time, simply switch toanother battery and keep going. VAX's ONEPWR™ Battery delivers both ease and convenience across the whole cordlessrange.Advanced lithium-ion batteries you can trustPremium batteries engineered for reliability & constant battery performance, even when the battery is low. The VAXONEPWR™ Battery monitors and balances individual cells to maximise run-times, storage life and safety.Extend your run timeAn extra ONEPWR™ Battery gives you the flexibility to extend your run time, if you need it, so you can always get the jobdone.Fast chargingFully charge your battery from empty in just 3 hours, or partly charge in less time if you only need to do a quick clean.LED runtime and diagnostics indicatorWith built in diagnostic LEDs, always know your battery is at optimal condition, ensuring battery life and run time.3-year guarantee
